title: DF-005: Accept UTC Z timestamps in Google Calendar conversion
brief: Fix GoogleCalendarService._to_sydney so it accepts common ISO UTC timestamps ending in Z on Python 3.9, converting them to Australia/Sydney while preserving offset-aware and naive timestamp behavior.

criteria.statement: GoogleCalendarService._to_sydney accepts UTC timestamps ending in Z and converts them to Australia/Sydney.
criteria.verification: Focused unit test calls _to_sydney with a Z timestamp and asserts the Sydney ISO output.

criteria.statement: Existing offset-aware and naive timestamp behavior is preserved.
criteria.verification: Focused unit tests assert offset-aware input is converted and naive input is treated as UTC.

criteria.statement: Existing Google Calendar service tests pass.
